basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Project Technical Support III Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of JIPMER. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JIPMER Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Life Sciences or related + 3 years experience in Medical or Medical Research, Post-graduation in Biological Sciences + 1 year experience, Fluency in Tamil (speaking, reading, writing)
qualification.details: Degree in Life Sciences / related to life science + 3 years experience in Medical (working with patients) OR Medical Research field OR Post-graduation in Biological Sciences + 1 year experience (as above). Fluency (speaking, reading and writing) in Tamil (mandatory).

selection_process: CV and documents Shortlisting Written test (if large number of candidates) Skill test (if applicable) Interview Final merit list
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support III post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Life Sciences or a related field with 3 years of experience, or a Post-graduation in Biological Sciences with 1 year of experience. Fluency in Tamil is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technical Support III position is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support III role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 28,000/- plus 18% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this government job at JIPMER?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support III position?
faq.answer: The selection process includes screening of applications, shortlisting, a written test (if applicable), a skill test (if applicable), and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Technical Support III in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Technical Support III position is contractual.
